params.name: The Magic Flute
params.description:
On Sept 28, 1780 AD, Mozart completed the opera The Magic Flute.
The Magic Flute is one of Mozart's most outstanding operas and his last. Despite his deteriorating physical condition, he devoted himself wholeheartedly to the creation of this masterpiece with the help of his supporters. The opera tells the story of the Egyptian prince Tamino's adventures, his ultimate victory over the Queen of the Night, and his marriage to Princess Pamina. The opera integrates the music and theatrical perform …
